PLANNER / M3. WEBINAR ATTENDANCE PLANNER
WHAT IS THE BEST STRATEGY FOR
BOOSTING WEBINAR AT TENDANCE?
Boosting webinar attendance requires overcoming the 2 key problems that
lead to low attendance:
• 	Low attendance due to distraction/time, etc.
• 	Low attendance due to psychology/resistance
It also requires generating desire and enthusiasm.
OVERCOMING DISTRACTION/TIME CONSTRAINTS
✓ 	Shorten the time between sign up and the webinar (have it be the next
day after sign up, or offer an immediate broadcast option, or an
attendance bonus (not as ideal)
✓ 	Use better reminders (more email reminders, SMS and messenger
reminders, communication from both your autoresponder and your
webinar company’s email system)
OVERCOMING PSYCHOLOGICAL RESISTANCE
✓ 	Demonstrate trustworthiness
✓ 	Provide value (that moves them toward achieving the transformation
immediately, between registration and webinar)
GENERATING DESIRE AND ENTHUSIASM
You can shift from resistance towards desire and enthusiasm via 5 key
anticipatory communications delivered throughout the pre-webinar phase.
Each of these is designed to reverse a negative emotion and make it
anticipatory, and to move them towards the mindset they have to have to be
willing to buy from you in the webinar.
Trust Builder (1)
This is where you share your desire to serve them and help them achieve the
transformation you’ve promised and show how you’ve already helped others
to achieve it. Then you restate the transformation you’ll provide, promise to
© Internet Alchemy, Inc. 	of	3 	17
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 17 --

PLANNER / M3. WEBINAR ATTENDANCE PLANNER
answer their questions on the webinar and say, “I look forward to seeing you
on the webinar.”
✓ 	The trust builder is usually sent early in the morning on Day 2 of your
sequence; two days after a prospect registers for your webinar and one
day before your webinar.
Personalization Promise (1)
This is where you let them know that you’re working on the script, but you
want to make sure that you include what’s most important to them; that
you’ll answer their questions on the webinar. Then you send them to a short
survey.
✓ 	The personalization promise is usually sent 1 hr after a prospect registers
for your webinar
Transformational Content (3)
The better these are, the better your attendance, so don’t skimp, but don’t
totally solve their problem. Don’t let them think they don’t need to attend/
buy because you’ve already solved it for them.
This is where you provide valuable content (for example 3 significant solutions
for issues they face that hold them back from achieving the transformation).
Ideally this is content that deals with objections to the purchase of your
product.
© Internet Alchemy, Inc. 	of	4 	17
bonus tip!
use survey data to further segment your list: create a list of
probable answers to questions 1 and 2 (pain points and
obstacles), create tags in email program for each, tag
respondents based on their answers, write and send different
emails based on those tags

PLANNER / M3. WEBINAR ATTENDANCE PLANNER
✓ 	The first transformational content piece is usually sent early in the
morning on Day 1 of your sequence; the day after a prospect registers for
your webinar
✓ 	The second transformational content piece is usually sent the afternoon of
Day 2 of your sequence
✓ 	The third transformational content piece is usually sent early in the
morning on the day of your webinar
For a more detailed exercise on creating an email sequenced based on
the 5 key communications, see the Post-Registration Email Strategy
exercise

PLANNER / M3. WEBINAR ATTENDANCE PLANNER
WHAT IS THE INSTANT BONUS FOR
REGISTERING?
A great way to boost webinar attendance is to offer a free gift (or “instant
bonus") for registering.
The best gifts:
✓ 	Start the process of resolving the pain/question they have but don’t deliver
the transformation you promise on the webinar (you still want them to
attend the webinar)
✓ 	Prepare them for the webinar (informationally and emotionally)
✓ 	Position you as the expert
✓ 	Position them as needing the information you’ll be giving on the webinar
✓ 	Give an instant win that can be projected to more wins coming on the
webinar
Don’t just use an existing gift; it should be created specifically with the
content of the webinar in mind and encourage them to attend the webinar.
You want to communicate: “I’m going to show you this, but it’s just a small
piece of achieving_____. Come to the webinar to learn everything.”
In the gift, be sure to include a specific reminder of the webinar date/time (if
variable, refer them to the email that gives that info).
Will you have an instant bonus for registering? If so, what will it be?

PLANNER / M3. WEBINAR ATTENDANCE PLANNER
WHAT (AND HOW ) DO I NEED TO
COMMUNICATE TO PROSPECTS AF TER
THEY REGISTER?
You can go a bit further with the strategies above by deploying a robust
attendance communications plan using email and other non-email
communication methods. This is the recommended plan to use to
communicate to your prospects leading up to the webinar, but you can test
and adjust these elements, timing and communications to fit your needs:
ATTENDANCE COMMUNICATION PLAN
Your attendance communication assets include:
✓ 	Pages
• 	Thank you page (begins the push to attend)
• 	Bonding page (builds their relationship with you)
• 	Transformational content (teaches them concepts related to your
webinar’s topic)
© Internet Alchemy, Inc. 	of	7 	17
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 17 --

PLANNER / M3. WEBINAR ATTENDANCE PLANNER
✓ 	Facebook
• 	Group (builds relationship, community and drives to other assets)
• 	Messenger (reminds and drives to other assets)
✓ 	Emails and Reminders
• 	Email sequence (reminds and drives to other assets)
• 	Webinar Provider’s sequence (reminders and webinar link)
• 	SMS reminder (last-minute reminder)
✓ 	Response Mechanism
• 	Questionnaire (finds out what’s most important to them and gets their
language (and improves future webinar positioning))
✓ 	Ads
• 	Facebook retargeting sequence (reminds and drives to other assets)
• 	Other sites retargeting sequence (reminds and drives to other assets)
WEBINAR THANK YOU PAGE
On your webinar thank you page, give them what they need to attend such
as:
✓ 	Date and time (multiple time zones, add to calendar link, countdown
timer)
✓ 	Option to register for test reminder(s)
✓ 	Add to Calendar Link
You should also sell them on attending by:
✓ 	Reasserting what they’ll get out of it
✓ 	Offering an instant bonus for registering
✓ 	Including credibility elements (e.g. Testimonials)
For more on your webinar thank you page, see the
Webinar Thank You Page checklist

PLANNER / M3. WEBINAR ATTENDANCE PLANNER
WHAT IS THE POST-REGISTRATION
EMAIL STRATEGY (AKA AT TENDANCE
PROMO )?
The goal of your email strategy once prospects have registered for the
webinar is to remind, inform, and build relationships.
See the first segment in this document (the best strategy for boosting
webinar attendance) for what to include in these emails, along with the Post-
Registration Email Strategy exercise.
You can super-charge your email strategy by segmenting your list and
sending different emails based on those segments.
REMIND
Remind them of the date, time and benefits of the webinar. This gets your
prospects thinking, “This totally makes sense, I should attend.”
✓ 	Every email should contain date and time
✓ 	Add to calendar link
✓ 	Attend link
✓ 	Reasons why they should attend
INFORM
Teach them something of value and give them a preview of the content of
the webinar. This gets your prospects thinking, “I didn’t know that, I should
attend.”
✓ 	Teach them something they don’t know
✓ 	Share statistics/facts
✓ 	All moving them forward towards the transformation promised in the
webinar
© Internet Alchemy, Inc. 	of	10 	17
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 10 of 17 --

PLANNER / M3. WEBINAR ATTENDANCE PLANNER
BUILD RELATIONSHIPS
Get them comfortable with you as an expert worth paying attention to. It gets
your prospects thinking, “I like this person. I want to hang out with them.” All
your emails should be written in a relationship style.
✓ 	Light, chatty, relaxed
✓ 	Story-based
✓ 	Example
✓ 	Meme graphic
SEGMENTED POST-REGISTRATION EMAILS
Kick your post-registration email strategy up a notch by segmenting your
emails. Start by adding a segmentation question to the process, then send
different emails based on those segments. The most efficient way to do this is
to create the base set of emails, then modify them for segments, completely
replacing them where needed.
The emails can:
✓ 	Bring up, acknowledge and solve their segment-specific problems/
questions. For example: “As someone who’s thinking of getting started, I
suspect one of your biggest questions is…”
✓ 	Use different tips/stories that will better appeal to that segment
✓ 	Assure them that this information is perfect for them as part of that
segment. For example: “And the cool thing is that the strategy I’m going
to share in part 3 of this webinar is the exact solution I recommend to my
clients who are just getting started.” Or: “And the cool thing is that, even
though you’re already an expert, the strategy I’m going to demonstrate
took my client, Jason’s business from $250k to $500k last year alone.”
© Internet Alchemy, Inc. 	of	11 	17
bonus tip!
the principles above also apply to your other post-
registration assets
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 11 of 17 --

PLANNER / M3. WEBINAR ATTENDANCE PLANNER
Where to Add Segmentation
✓ 	After sign-up, before thank you page
✓ 	In first email (not before sign-up, you want to get their email and
registration first, exception > where you’re inviting them to different
webinars based on their segment)

PLANNER / M3. WEBINAR ATTENDANCE PLANNER
WHAT ARE RETARGETING ADS AND
SHOULD I USE THEM?
Retargeting ads are ads that you see as a result of having visited a given web
page in the past. Facebook ads are recommended for this. This strategy helps
you stay in front of your registrants (so they don’t forget about you) and drives
them to your other assets.
RETARGETING STRATEGY
✓ 	Retarget only people who have been to your webinar registration thank
you page
✓ 	Set up ads pointing people at your asset pages
✓ 	Only run ads for the time between the time that they sign up and the
webinar
HOW TO SET UP RETARGETING ADS
1. 	Set up an account
2. 	Put a few lines of code on your page
3. 	Create your ad campaign

PLANNER / M3. WEBINAR ATTENDANCE PLANNER
WHAT IS THE PERSONALIZED VIDEO
STRATEGY?
Want to kick your post-registration communication strategy up another
notch? Deploy a personalized video strategy. The personalized video
strategy can result in a 25%+ increase in webinar attendance, and sales rates.
PERSONALIZED VIDEO STRATEGY
Using a service like bombbomb.com or bonjoro.com, create a personalized
video for each person who registers for your webinar. The higher the price, the
more important it is to do this. It’s optional, but consider adding trust-
building elements to this (if you do that, keep it short). This strategy can result
in a 25%+ increase in webinar attendance, and sales rates. You want to
communicate:
“Hi [name]. This is [your name] and I just wanted to send you a quick video to
tell you how excited I was to see that you registered for my webinar
on___________ [why it’s important they attend]. I promise it will be worth your
while. I look forward to seeing you there on [date]. We’ll be starting right on
time at [time/timezone].”
Here’s how you can take this strategy to the next level:
✓ 	Ask them a question and invite to answer it online via email, text or
messenger
✓ 	Then be prepared to answer them
© Internet Alchemy, Inc. 	of	14 	17

PLANNER / M3. WEBINAR ATTENDANCE PLANNER
This strategy can also be used in other ways:
✓ 	“I saw you weren’t able to attend, here’s the replay.”
✓ 	If they watched your offer but didn’t buy: “What questions do you have?
Want to talk?”
✓ 	Encouraging handpicked people you know really should buy to look at it /
have a conversation with you.
✓ 	Welcoming new buyers

PLANNER / M3. WEBINAR ATTENDANCE PLANNER
WHAT ARE SOME ADDITIONAL
AT TENDANCE STRATEGIES TO
CONSIDER?
Here are 4 additional elements that can support webinar attendance and
how you can use them:
FACEBOOK GROUP
✓ 	Send invite from thank you page and emails
✓ 	Push people to other assets
✓ 	Report on their work on transformation content
✓ 	Build community
✓ 	Be active there
FACEBOOK LIVES
✓ 	Run Facebook Live broadcasts to the entire group that support your
transformational content and invite engagement and community
✓ 	Ask questions in them
✓ 	Help people get to know you
FACEBOOK MESSENGER
✓ 	Invite from thank you page and emails
✓ 	Support
✓ 	Facebook group
✓ 	Other assets
✓ 	Webinar starting alerts
SMS ALERT
✓ 	Sign up registration
✓ 	Last-minute reminder alert
